training_status: Strength training with fat loss focus, targeting sub 10% body fat

benefits.description: Tool for weight loss and fat reduction

side_effects.description: Complete fatigue and hunger crash if not refeeding on 7th day; body will not tolerate extended underfeeding

protocol_notes: Been on Mounjaro/Zepbound since release with one year off due to insurance. Uses 7-day refeeding cycle. Emphasizes importance of electrolytes, hydration, and strength training to prevent loose skin and body aches.
